abort.no_compatible_transmitters: No RF transmitter supporting 433.92 MHz OOK found. Add an ESPHome CC1101 or Broadlink RM4 Pro first.

error.invalid_fan_id: Fan ID must be exactly 6 hexadecimal characters (e.g. 0e37ee).

data_description.transmitter: The RF transmitter entity that will send commands to this fan.
data_description.fan_name: A friendly name for this fan (e.g. Bedroom Fan).

fan_id.title: Select Fan ID
fan_id.description: Choose a previously captured fan ID or enter a new one.

manual_id.title: Enter Fan ID Manually
manual_id.description: Run `scripts/get_fan_id.sh` to capture your fan's 6-character hex ID from your remote.

test.title: Test Connection
test.description:
A power command has been sent to **{fan_name}**. Did the fan respond?

If not, check that the transmitter is within range and that the fan ID is correct.

reset_state.name: Reset State
reset_state.description: Resets assumed state to off. Use after physically powering the fan off so HA re-syncs — next turn on will start from speed 1.
